member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Config.AgenticAIConfig.WorkflowType
member.summary: The type of workflow: Irpa, AiWorkflow, AiAgent, or Agentic.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Config.AgenticAIConfig.AiParticipation
member.summary: How much the AI is allowed to act. Ignored for Irpa workflows.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Configuration.Config.AgenticAIConfig.ApplyProfile
member.summary: Applies WorkflowType + AiParticipation presets, filling Planner.Type and Autonomy with the right values for the chosen workflow profile. Manual overrides set after this call take precedence.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Configuration.Loader.ValaiorpConfigurationLoader
member.summary:
Loads valaiorp.json from disk, or writes a fully-annotated template if no file is found, so users can discover all options without reading source code.
Usage: var config = ValaiorpConfigurationLoader.LoadOrCreate(); // auto-finds / auto-creates var config = ValaiorpConfigurationLoader.Load("path/to/file.json"); // explicit path ValaiorpConfigurationLoader.WriteTemplate("valaiorp.json"); // generate template only

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Configuration.Loader.ValaiorpConfigurationLoader.LoadOrCreate(System.String)
member.summary: Searches for valaiorp.json in the current directory, then the application base directory. If not found, writes a template to the current directory and returns framework defaults so the application can still start.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Configuration.Loader.ValaiorpConfigurationLoader.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads and deserialises an existing config file (JSONC comments supported).

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Configuration.Loader.ValaiorpConfigurationLoader.WriteTemplate(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a fully-annotated JSONC template with every option and its allowed values to . Overwrites existing file.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Configuration.Loader.ValaiorpConfigurationLoader.FindConfigFile(System.String)
member.summary: Searches known locations for valaiorp.json. Returns the first path that exists, or null.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.GuardrailConfig.EnablePiiRedaction
member.summary: Detect and redact PII (email, phone, SSN, credit card, IP) from all content.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.GuardrailConfig.EnablePromptInjectionDetection
member.summary: Block prompt injection attempts in user inputs.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.GuardrailConfig.EnableBannedKeywords
member.summary: Block content containing any of the BannedKeywords entries.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.GuardrailConfig.MaxInputLengthChars
member.summary: Block input content exceeding this character count. 0 = disabled.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.GuardrailConfig.MaxOutputLengthChars
member.summary: Block output content exceeding this character count. 0 = disabled.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.GuardrailConfig.AllowedToolIds
member.summary: When set, only these tool IDs may be invoked. Null means all tools are allowed (subject to DeniedToolIds).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.GuardrailConfig.DeniedToolIds
member.summary: Tool IDs that are always blocked, regardless of AllowedToolIds.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.GuardrailConfig.EnableDataClassification
member.summary: Tag content with a data-sensitivity classification and emit audit warnings.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.KnowledgeConfig.EmbeddingProvider
member.summary: Provider for embedding generation (e.g. "openai", "anthropic", "ollama", "custom").

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.KnowledgeConfig.EmbeddingModel
member.summary: Embedding model ID as the provider names it (e.g. "text-embedding-3-small").

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.Provider
member.summary: Provider identifier: "anthropic" | "openai" | "ollama" | "custom".

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.ModelId
member.summary: Model ID as the provider names it (e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-6", "gpt-4o").

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.ApiKey
member.summary: API key. Leave empty to resolve from the environment variable named in ApiKeyEnvVar.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.ApiKeyEnvVar
member.summary: Environment variable that holds the API key (default: "{PROVIDER}_API_KEY"). Used when ApiKey is null or empty.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.ApiKeyFile
member.summary: Path to a local file whose first non-empty line is the API key. Useful for Docker secrets mounts or CI artifact drops. Used when ApiKey and ApiKeyEnvVar are both unset.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL override (useful for Ollama or proxied endpoints).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.SystemPromptTemplate
member.summary: Default system prompt template. Supports {variables} substitution.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.RequestTimeout
member.summary: HTTP request timeout for LLM calls.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig.ResolveApiKey
member.summary: Resolves the API key synchronously: literal → env var → file. For async vault providers use IApiKeyProvider / AddLlmClient(config, provider).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.PersistenceConfig.LogDirectory
member.summary: Directory for JSONL execution logs. Always written to regardless of SQL config.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.PersistenceConfig.QueueDirectory
member.summary: Directory for JSONL queue files. Used by the default JsonlWorkQueue.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.PersistenceConfig.ConnectionString
member.summary: Optional SQL connection string. When set, host app should call services.AddSqlPersistence(factory) to also log and queue via SQL. Leave empty to run entirely file-backed (the default).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.WorkflowProfile
member.summary: Maps (WorkflowType, AiParticipation) to concrete planner and autonomy settings. Call AgenticAIConfig.ApplyProfile() to apply these presets automatically.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Configuration.Providers.DefaultApiKeyProvider
member.summary: Resolution order: ApiKey (literal) → ApiKeyEnvVar (environment variable) → ApiKeyFile (path to a file whose first line is the key). Falls back to the conventional "{PROVIDER}_API_KEY" env var if no env var name is set.
